```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotrix)
df <- read.csv("/Users/aloan/OneDrive - HC-SC PHAC-ASPC/Desktop/invitro pfas/24 h vaibility experiment/R input.csv")

custom_colors <- c("black", "#330597","#8405a7","#b12a90","#d35171","#f68f44","#fec029")
chemical_order <- c("DMSO","PFOS", "PFOA", "PFNA", "PFDA", "PFHxS", "GenX")

```

```{r}
#remove blank rows
df <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(Human), Human != "")
#add seex info
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Sex = case_when(
      startsWith(Human, "F") ~ "Female",
      startsWith(Human, "M") ~ "Male",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

df_rep <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Raw_rep1 = Raw_rep1,
    Raw_rep2 = Raw_rep2,
    Cells_rep1 = Cells_rep1,
    Cells_rep2 = Cells_rep2
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Raw_rep1, Raw_rep2, Cells_rep1, Cells_rep2),
    names_to = "Type",
    values_to = "Value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Metric = ifelse(grepl("Raw", Type), "Raw", "Cells"),
    Rep = ifelse(grepl("rep1", Type), "rep1", "rep2")
  )

df_human <- df_rep %>%
  group_by(Human, Chemical, Treatment, Metric, Sex)%>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(Value),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

mean_data <- df_human %>%
  group_by(Chemical, Treatment, Metric) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_stat = mean(mean),
    se_stat = std.error(mean) * 2.365,  # 95% CI
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```


#Raw absorbance
```{r}
df_human$Chemical <- factor(df_human$Chemical, levels = chemical_order)

plot_raw <- ggplot() +

  geom_jitter(
    data = df_human %>% filter(Metric == "Raw"),
    aes(
      x = Chemical,
      y = mean,
      color = Chemical,
      fill = Chemical,
      shape = Sex
    ),
    stroke = 0.8,
    alpha = 0.3,
    size = 1.5,
    width = 0.15
  ) +

  geom_point(
    data = mean_data %>% filter(Metric == "Raw"),
    aes(x = Chemical, y = mean_stat, color = Chemical),
    size = 2
  ) +

  geom_errorbar(
    data = mean_data %>% filter(Metric == "Raw"),
    aes(x = Chemical, ymin = mean_stat - se_stat, ymax = mean_stat + se_stat, color = Chemical),
    width = 0.1
  ) +

  facet_wrap(Treatment ~ .) +

 scale_color_manual(values = custom_colors) +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = custom_colors) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(Male = 21, Female = 24)) +

  labs(x = "Chemical", y = "Raw signal") +

  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 10),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    strip.text.y.right = element_blank(),
    strip.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "b",
    panel.grid.major = element_line(size = 0.5),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

plot_raw
ggsave(
  filename = "/Users/aloan/OneDrive - HC-SC PHAC-ASPC/Desktop/invitro pfas/24 h vaibility experiment/viability_rawabs.png",
  plot = plot_raw,
  bg = "white",
  width = 8,
  height = 4,
  dpi = 300
)
```


#of cells per well
```{r}
plot_Cells <- ggplot() +

  geom_jitter(
    data = df_human %>% filter(Metric == "Cells"),
    aes(
      x = Chemical,
      y = mean,
      color = Chemical,
      fill = Chemical,
      shape = Sex
    ),
    stroke = 0.8,
    alpha = 0.3,
    size = 1.5,
    width = 0.15
  ) +

  geom_point(
    data = mean_data %>% filter(Metric == "Cells"),
    aes(x = Chemical, y = mean_stat, color = Chemical),
    size = 2 ) +
geom_errorbar(
    data = mean_data %>% filter(Metric == "Cells"),
    aes(x = Chemical, ymin = mean_stat - se_stat, ymax = mean_stat + se_stat, color = Chemical),
    width = 0.1) +

  facet_wrap(Treatment ~ .) +

 scale_color_manual(values = custom_colors) +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = custom_colors) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(Male = 21, Female = 24)) +

  labs(x = "Chemical", y = "# of cells") +

  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 10),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    strip.text.y.right = element_blank(),
    strip.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "b",
    panel.grid.major = element_line(size = 0.5),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

plot_Cells
ggsave(
  filename = "/Users/aloan/OneDrive - HC-SC PHAC-ASPC/Desktop/invitro pfas/24 h vaibility experiment/viability_cells.png",
  plot = plot_Cells,
  bg = "white",
  width = 8,
  height = 4,
  dpi = 300
)
```
